query: My order #ORD-2026-0042 shows delivered but I never received it

candidates.candidate_text: Missing Package Resolution SOP: Step 1 — Verify delivery address and signature. Step 2 — Contact carrier with tracking number. Step 3 — File a missing package claim within 14 days of delivery status. Escalate to supervisor if claim is denied.

Carrier Claim Process: For lost or missing packages, customers must submit a carrier claim within 30 days. Claims require order confirmation, tracking number, and proof of value. Reimbursement is processed within 10 business days.

FAQ: Order Delivery Issues — Q: What if my package says delivered but I did not receive it? A: Check with household members or neighbors first. If still missing, contact support within 48 hours to initiate a trace. Most missing packages are resolved within 5 days.

Agent transcript: Customer reported order #ORD-2026-0038 not delivered despite status 'Delivered'. Agent advised checking with building management. Customer asked for re-ship. Agent escalated to carrier liaison. Outcome: re-ship approved.
Employee leave request policy: Annual leave entitlement, sick leave procedures, and parental leave guidelines for full-time employees.
